meta.title: The Enchanted Forest Adventure
meta.author: Adventure Creator
meta.description: A short magical adventure through an enchanted forest with multiple endings.

start.text: You stand at the edge of a magical forest. Ancient trees tower above you, their leaves whispering secrets of forgotten times. The air hums with ancient magic, and two paths lie before you.

sunny_glen.text: You follow the sunlit path to a peaceful glen where golden light filters through the canopy. A friendly squirrel approaches you, holding a glowing acorn in its paws.

whispering_oak.text: The acorn begins to glow brighter in your hand. As you approach an ancient oak tree, the acorn pulses with energy. The tree's bark shifts, revealing a hidden doorway.

babbling_brook.text: You continue along the path until you reach a crystal-clear brook. The water sparkles with magical energy, and as you gaze into it, your reflection shows not your current self, but a possible future version.

choices.text: Study the vision in the water

dark_thicket.text: The dark, mossy trail leads you into a dense thicket where little light penetrates. The air grows cold, and you sense movement in the shadows. A pair of glowing eyes appears before you.

guardian.text: A wise old wolf emerges from the shadows. His fur is silvered with age, and his eyes hold ancient knowledge. He regards you carefully, testing your courage without words.

ending_treasure.text: Inside the tree, you discover the long-lost treasure of the forest king! Jewels, ancient artifacts, and magical items glitter in the dim light. You are now rich beyond imagination.

ending_curiosity.text: As you hesitate, the tree's doorway slowly closes. You're safe outside, but a deep regret fills you as you wonder what wonders you might have discovered within.

ending_reflection.text: The vision in the water shows you a future where you've gained great wisdom. You understand things you never could before, seeing the interconnectedness of all life in the forest.

ending_ambush.text: As you draw your weapon, goblins leap from the shadows! They overwhelm you with numbers, and your adventure ends here in the dark thicket.

ending_respect.text: The wolf nods in approval and grants you a powerful boon - the ability to understand the language of all forest creatures. You gain a new respect for the natural world.

ending_lost.text: You turn and run blindly through the forest. When you finally stop, you realize you're completely lost, with no idea how to find your way back to familiar paths.
